Metadata.homeDescription: An EU-funded real-world laboratory for innovative and sustainable building in South Tyrol.
Metadata.projektDescription: An EU-funded real-world laboratory for innovative building in South Tyrol.
Metadata.materialienDescription: Mapping local, circular building materials in South Tyrol.

HomeTeaser.projektTitle: A real-world lab for the architecture of tomorrow.
HomeTeaser.projektDescription: LOCLAB researches sustainable building with local materials in the Alps. As a Living Lab, we connect science, architecture and craftsmanship — in a real construction project that sets new standards.
HomeTeaser.materialienDescription: Wood, clay, straw, hempcrete and natural stone — all from the region. We analyse and test traditional building materials with modern methods to unlock their future potential.
HomeTeaser.workshopsDescription: In interdisciplinary workshops and residencies, we bring together researchers, architects and craftspeople. Hands-on, directly on the building site — for a genuine knowledge transfer.

About.heading: A real-world lab for innovative building.
About.bodyLarge: LocLab is an EU-funded real-world lab for local, circular and low-tech building in South Tyrol.
About.bodySmall: At the centre are two modular houses serving as physical and digital test fields. Through transdisciplinary research, we focus on material life cycles, community participation and structural sensing — for a new era of sustainable building.
About.quote: Two modular houses as physical and digital real-world laboratories.
